## Disclaimer

> This is a personal DIY investment tool, not financial advice. Past results are
> not predictive of future performance. The author is not a registered advisor.
> All figures are self-reported and unaudited by a third party.

---

## Methodology

### Data Sources
| Source | Type | Tier |
|---|---|---|
| yfinance | prices, fundamentals, news | free, no key |
| FRED | macro (Fed funds, CPI, CAD/USD) | free, no key |
| CoinGecko v3 | crypto prices | free, no key |
| CNN Fear & Greed | sentiment | free, no key |
| Google News RSS | news headlines | free, no key |
| Finnhub | quotes + fundamentals fallback | free, key required |
| Alpha Vantage | fundamentals fallback | free, key required |
| Tiingo | EOD history fallback | free, key required |

### Skills Backtested

Each skill is approximated by a deterministic Python rule applied to OHLC bars.
LLM thesis, news sentiment, and qualitative overlay are NOT replayed.
Treat rule-based results as a **lower bound** on actual skill quality.

- Universe: AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, XEQT.TO, VFV.TO
- Lookback: 1095 days
- Transaction cost: 5.0 bps/leg

---
